title: lusis #3080
definition:
1) a loosing, setting free
    1a) of a prisoner
    1b) of the bond of marriage, divorce
 2) release, ransoming, deliverance
    2a) of liquidating a debt
 3) means or power of releasing or loosing
nasbUsage:
